text.title: AI Persona Building (Single-Pass) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the ai-persona-building methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.rationale: Single-pass output mistaken for validated personas drives wrong decisions.

rule.statement: Pipeline MUST be a single Sonnet+Haiku pass; no clustering.
rule.rationale: Adding clustering blurs the line with the two-pass methodology.

rule.statement: Each persona MUST cite ≥1 secondary source (analytics segment, market report).
rule.rationale: Truly ungrounded personas are pure speculation.

rule.statement: Each persona MUST carry a 'validation_required: true' flag.
rule.rationale: Downstream consumers need a machine-readable warning.
Fewer than 3 loses diversity; more than 5 dilutes attention.

rule.statement: When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
